summary: Estate Guardian page frontend testing complete. All 11 features tested and verified. The redesigned chat page with compact header, maximized chat area, inline welcome actions, suggested questions, and popovers all work correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports.

issues: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key /admin' - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Guardian page loads and shows welcome message with personalized greeting
Estate Guardian header with bot icon (gold gradient) and title 'AI estate specialist' renders correctly
New Chat button (RotateCcw icon) is present and functional
Export PDF button (FileDown icon) is present with gold color
3 action buttons visible in welcome state: Analyze Vault (blue), Generate Checklist (green), Readiness Score (orange)
3 suggested question chips visible in welcome state
Text input with placeholder 'Ask about your estate plan...' present and functional
Send button present, disabled when input empty, enabled when text entered
After sending message, welcome actions hide and toggle buttons appear
Actions popover toggle works after conversation starts - shows all 3 actions
Questions popover toggle works after conversation starts - shows 5 suggested questions
Disclaimer text 'Not legal advice. Consult a licensed attorney.' visible
Section Lock Banner 'Section Unlocked' visible at top
Mobile responsive layout works - all elements visible and properly wrapped
Mobile bottom nav present with Users, TVT, Home icons
Chat messages area scrollable with proper styling
Loading indicator 'Thinking...' appears during AI response
critical_code_review_comments: GuardianPage.js uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements - good for testing
Conditional rendering of welcome actions vs toggle buttons based on hasConversation (messages.length > 1) works correctly
Mobile responsive layout uses flex-wrap for action buttons and suggested questions
Popovers have proper backdrop blur and z-index for overlay effect
AI chat integration with xAI Grok works correctly via /api/chat/guardian endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Estate Guardian page (GuardianPage.js) fully tested. All features working: compact header with bot icon/title/new-chat/export-pdf buttons, maximized scrollable chat area, inline welcome actions (Analyze Vault, Generate Checklist, Readiness Score) shown only before conversation starts, suggested questions as chips, popovers for actions/questions that appear once conversation is active, clean input bar with disclaimer. Mobile responsive design verified. App URL: https://layout-stable.preview.emergentagent.com. Login with admin@carryon.com / admin123, navigate to /guardian.

elements: 3 action buttons (Analyze Vault, Generate Checklist, Readiness Score)
Send button with conditional disable state
